allow: Bash(docker exec nextwave-crm sh -c "ls /app/.next_docker/server/app/api/whatsapp/messages/ && ls /app/.next_docker/server/app/\\\(dashboard\\\)/clientes/components/ 2>&1 || ls /app/.next_docker/server/app/ | head -10")

Bash(docker exec nextwave-crm sh -c 'cd /app && node -e ""const p=new \(require\(\\""@prisma/client\\""\).PrismaClient\)\(\); p.\\$queryRawUnsafe\(\\""SELECT COUNT\(*\) as t FROM wa_messages\\""\).then\(r=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r\)\)\).catch\(e=>console.log\(\\""NO TABLE:\\"",e.message\)\).finally\(\(\)=>p.\\$disconnect\(\)\)""')

Bash(docker exec nextwave-crm node -e "const {PrismaClient}=require\(''@prisma/client''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);p.$queryRawUnsafe\(''SELECT instanceName,status,isActive FROM WhatsAppChannel''\).then\(r=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r\)\)\).catch\(e=>console.log\(''err:'',e.message\)\).finally\(\(\)=>p.$disconnect\(\)\)")

Bash(docker exec nextwave-crm sh -c 'node -e ""const p=require\(\\""/app/node_modules/@prisma/client\\""\).PrismaClient;const db=new p\(\);db.\\$queryRawUnsafe\(\\""SELECT instanceName,status FROM WhatsAppChannel\\""\).then\(r=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r\)\)\).finally\(\(\)=>db.\\$disconnect\(\)\)""')

Bash(docker exec nextwave-crm sh -c "node -e ''const p=require\(""/app/node_modules/@prisma/client""\).PrismaClient;const db=new p\(\);db.$queryRawUnsafe\(""SELECT id,instance_name,remote_jid,body,from_me FROM wa_messages""\).then\(r=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r\)\)\).finally\(\(\)=>process.exit\(\)\)''")
